strengths: Over 15 years of diverse, hands-on software development experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems, meeting the minimum tenure requirement.
Demonstrates strong initiative and long-term project ownership through founding and maintaining the open-source GISCollective platform.
Possesses a deep commitment to software craftsmanship, with consistent application of TDD, CI/CD, and other modern engineering practices.
concerns: Experience is consistently at the Senior/Staff Engineer level, focusing on implementation rather than the director-level strategic planning, product vision, and leadership required.

AI expertise is nascent and appears limited to infrastructure in his most recent role, lacking the deep, demonstrated experience in building AI-powered products or platforms expected for a role centered on AI strategy.
The resume shows no experience advising strategic customers or partners, a key responsibility that requires external-facing communication and influence skills.
response.justification: The candidate presents as a strong, versatile software craftsman, but his experience is fundamentally misaligned with the director-level strategic nature of this role. His career has been focused on hands-on implementation at the senior and staff levels, with no evidence of setting high-level technical strategy, influencing enterprise-wide product direction, or advising external customers. Furthermore, his AI experience is very recent and appears limited to tooling and infrastructure, falling significantly short of the 'recognized expertise' and track record of building AI-powered platforms required for a role focused on AI strategy.
